subcodes.first_line: Doth this Tablet bear the mysteries of thy Lord? Doth the Pen flow with whatsoever He willeth? Nay, by His own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل اللوح یحمل اسرار ربک هل القلم یجری منه ما اراد لا و نفسه الحق بل بما
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God
